judge_result.short_rationale: Includes fresh air, but omits two required immediate actions: call 911/ambulance if not breathing and call poison control/doctor for treatment advice. It also adds unsupported cross-incident advice (wash exposed skin/face, do not induce vomiting, do not give drinks), which triggers critical safety failure.
